pm.archetypeName: /A Hybrid — Post-IPO dislocation (-66%) on a capital-light franchise with hidden franchise economics. IPO valuation overshoot + competitive deterioration + PR crises + China ADR discount create event-driven repricing; underlying franchise model (97% franchised, multi-stream royalty revenue) is Archetype A franchise element.
